WhyItMatters: Email and URL events can identify the likely initial access path before successful authentication.
ReviewSteps: Review Defender for Office 365 EmailEvents for the user.
Review UrlClickEvents before and after suspicious sign-ins.
Compare message delivery, click time, and authentication time.
Review Safe Links action and threat verdict.
Review related campaigns, sender, URL, and attachment context.
RecommendedActions: Review Safe Links and Safe Attachments.
